finding: A redacted authorization packet must be bound to the exact repository, workflow reference, source commit, workflow run ID, and run attempt that produced it before it can authorize production dispatch.

verified_behavior.verification_route: Node native test runner against byte-equivalent implementation logic

claim_limits: This proves source-level context validation behavior, not that GitHub Actions executed the workflow.
This does not prove Cloudflare credentials are configured or authorized.
This does not prove a Cloudflare Pages deployment or resolving hostname exists.
Provenance binding does not prove scientific or medical claim truth.
falsification_route: Reject this evidence if the committed validator accepts a packet whose repository, workflow reference, source commit, run ID, or run attempt differs from the trusted runtime context, or if any retained packet contains credential values.
